name: Generic Country Attractiveness
description: Broad country platform quality across policy, ecosystem, talent, infrastructure, customer proximity, cost, stability, speed, and ESG readiness.

name: UMC Fab 12i Synergy
description: Prioritizes locations that reinforce UMC Singapore Fab 12i, mature-node manufacturing assurance, customer qualification, and regional customer engineering support.

name: Advanced Packaging Ecosystem
description: Prioritizes OSAT, testing, substrate and equipment adjacency, logistics, customer demand, partnership potential, and proximity to UMC wafer output.

name: Sales & Customer Support Coverage
description: Prioritizes customer density, fabless / IDM / EMS / OSAT presence, regional headquarters, ease of travel, FAE support, logistics coordination, and Fab 12i customer support relevance.

name: Low Risk / Fast Entry
description: Prioritizes stable, fast-to-launch, lower-complexity moves such as representative office, customer engineering support hub, and partner-led expansion.

name: UMC Global Layout Fit
description: Prioritizes how a Southeast Asia location complements UMC's global foundry footprint, Fab 12i anchor, customer diversification, supply assurance, and partner ecosystem.
